name: szilard_substep_promotion_sweep
classification_note: Promotion-focused search on the strongest low-noise substep region. It expands high-strength feedback and reset controls and optimizes a controller-style closeness score.

summary.scope_note: Promotion-focused search for the stochastic Szilard substep lane. It expands the strongest low-noise controls and optimizes a controller-style closeness score.
